profileSeed: Senior Frontend / Product Engineer with 9+ years building TypeScript-first web products in Vue, Nuxt, React, and Node. Strong track record shipping user-facing features end to end, improving product quality, and building maintainable frontend systems with a focus on performance, reliability, observability, and cross-functional delivery. Comfortable owning vertical slices from discovery through production rollout, working remotely across EMEA time zones.

stories.text: Took over full frontend ownership of a Vue 3 / Nuxt platform for a German client after its first month.

Led a Nuxt 4 migration to a Feature-Sliced / vertical-slice architecture, codifying ownership, dependency direction, and lint-enforced public APIs to reduce cross-feature coupling and keep changes reviewable.
Established a token-driven design-system layer over PrimeVue, shipping reusable primitives with Storybook documentation and Figma-aligned component contracts.
Added frontend observability with Mixpanel, Sentry, correlation IDs, and structured telemetry to improve release traceability and reduce low-value client error noise.
Designed a GitLab release pipeline with semantic versioning, Sentry release tracking, SonarQube quality checks, and AWS OIDC-based Amplify deployments.
Built the Capacitor mobile delivery pipeline for iOS and Android, including native build/release automation, preflight validation, and CI hooks for TestFlight and signed Android artifacts.
Standardized deterministic frontend testing with Vitest and Playwright, added accessibility/performance assertions to critical journeys, and wired SonarQube into CI quality gates.
Improved frontend DX and CI reliability by standardizing lockfile generation and adding an Amplify build guard to reuse cached artifacts.
Authored frontend platform RFCs for analytics and experimentation, aligning implementation with product, analytics, privacy, and mobile constraints.
Managed application state with Pinia, using typed stores and composable patterns for cross-feature data sharing in the Vue 3 / Nuxt platform.
Integrated Zod for runtime schema validation on API boundaries, enforcing typed contracts between backend responses and frontend consumers.
Adopted Tailwind CSS for utility-first styling across the platform, reducing custom CSS overhead and improving design-system consistency.
Owned the frontend of a multi-step ATS funnel handling ~400K applications per year.
Increased ATS funnel completion from ~39% to ~65% via instrumentation, friction-point analysis, and validation UX rebuilds.
Built shared UI libraries with Storybook and semantic versioning, used across multiple internal product surfaces.
Worked with product / design / backend on typed API contracts, validation, and observable error handling.
Instituted CI/CD quality gates with Lighthouse CI and SonarQube to keep performance and code-health regressions out of main.
Received the company-wide Proxify Quality Award 2024.
Built a self-service onboarding portal that replaced a manual workflow and reduced time-to-active-account.
Served as primary frontend owner for React / TypeScript SPAs and dashboards.
Raised Lighthouse scores from the 40s to the 90s by attacking render-blocking assets, image strategy, and JS payload size.
Built small backend-adjacent utilities with Node.js and AWS Lambda to support frontend feature work.
Modernized legacy frontend codebases incrementally, migrating to TypeScript and component-driven architecture without halting feature delivery.
